overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian Night City alley, navigating a dark rubble-filled interior with burning barrels, and continuing along a main street sidewalk at dusk with neon-lit transit tracks and towering corporate buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with industrial containers and abandoned vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow back alley between industrial buildings

entered.detail: large gray industrial container with warning signs
derelict red compact car parked against the wall
large wall painting of skull with crossed wrenches and gang name

segments.scene_description: The clip opens in a gritty back alley at dusk, with the camera moving past industrial containers toward a red abandoned car. A large Tyger Claws gang mural is visible on the wall ahead as the character approaches a dark entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: collapsed building interior with burning trash barrels

events.description: enters dark rubble-filled interior space from the alleyway

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow debris-filled corridor illuminated by burning barrels

entered.detail: metal barrels with open fires providing warm orange light
piles of broken concrete and construction debris
damaged concrete walls with exposed rebar

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed space filled with rubble and burning barrels. The environment is dimly lit by firelight, with collapsed concrete walls and debris scattered across the dirt floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with elevated NCART transit tracks

events.description: exits rubble interior back to street level with view of city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to elevated transit tracks with neon lighting

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction on the street

entered.detail: massive corporate building with illuminated signage and geometric facade
elevated train tracks with glowing cyan neon lights along the rails
large concrete pedestrian or vehicle overpass spanning the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the rubble, the scene opens onto a main city street at dusk. The massive Petrochem building dominates the left skyline while elevated NCART tracks with cyan neon lights run parallel to the sidewalk. The Tyger Claws mural is now visible on the right wall as the character continues walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with traffic signals

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk approaching a major intersection

entered.detail: suspended traffic signals showing red then green
green street sign reading Almond mounted on a pole
tall palm tree at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major intersection with visible traffic lights and street signage. The Almond street sign becomes visible as the traffic light changes from red to green. The environment remains consistently dystopian with industrial architecture and neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty, secluded alleyway through a ruined interior and out into the neon-lit expanse of a dystopian city street. It begins by moving past industrial containers toward a red abandoned car and a gang mural, before the camera pushes forward into a dark, enclosed space. As the character navigates this interior, the environment shifts to a dimly lit ruin filled with rubble and the orange glow of burning barrels. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the debris onto a main sidewalk, where the skyline is dominated by the massive Petrochem building and cyan neon NCART tracks. Finally, the movement continues toward a major intersection, passing the Tyger Claws mural once more as the Almond street sign comes into view and the traffic light shifts from red to green.
